article_title: Final Fantasy XIV Reveals Evercold for January 2027 With a Twin-Mode Battle System, an Evangelion Raid, and a New Saga in 13 Years

content_preview.title: Final Fantasy XIV Reveals Evercold for January 2027 With a Twin-Mode Battle System, an Evangelion Raid, and a New Saga in 13 Years
content_preview.summary: At Fan Festival 2026, Square Enix announced FFXIV's sixth expansion Evercold for January 2027, a Switch 2 launch in August, Reborn and Evolved combat modes, and an Evangelion alliance raid series.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Square Enix used the keynote of Final Fantasy XIV Fan Festival 2026 to unveil the MMO's sixth expansion, *Evercold*, alongside a battery of changes to the game's combat system, platform support, and overarching narrative. The expansion is scheduled to launch in January 2027 and will open the *Godless Realms Saga*, [the first new long-form story arc in the game's 13-year history according to Kotaku](https://kotaku.com/final-fantasy-14-evercold-expansion-ff14-trailer-release-200069053...

editor_notes.content_quality: Strong Gaming News piece. All 6 prior findings cleanly addressed.
editor_notes.source_verification: Verified removed: 'Ghosts of Desire', 'khara, Inc.', 'Anaheim', 'Patch 8.0', 'level cap from 100'. Title trimmed to 140 chars. Yoshida 'A Realm Reborn structural shift' quote removed. The remaining 'A Realm Reborn' reference is now framing only ('the previous decade-plus from A Realm Reborn through Dawntrail') — this is well-known FFXIV history (2013 rebuild) and not attributed to any specific source quote.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Clean APPROVE on re-review. Ready to merge.
